temporal_description: A medium shot captures a man in a dark, short-sleeved uniform standing in what appears to be an office or police station. He has dark hair and is looking off to the right with a concerned expression, his hand near his mouth. In the foreground, the back of another person's head and shoulder, clad in a blue shirt, partially obscures the view. In the background, other people in similar uniforms are visible, standing around the office space. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is present in the upper left corner. The camera remains steady, focusing on the man in the dark uniform. The audio features a female narrator speaking in a clear, professional, and serious tone, characteristic of a news report or documentary. Her voice is steady and informative as she states, "之及三合会调查课警司黄志诚。" The camera angle shifts to an over-the-shoulder view from behind the person in the blue shirt. We see the backs of two men in light blue, short-sleeved uniforms. They are looking down and to the right, seemingly at something out of frame. The man on the right is in sharp focus, while the man on the left is slightly blurred. The "风行网" watermark remains in the upper left. The camera pans slightly to the right, maintaining the over-the-shoulder perspective. The two men in uniform are still the focus, now looking towards a bright, out-of-focus window or doorway. The man on the right continues to look down, while the man on the left is slightly out of focus. The "风行网" watermark is still visible. The narrator continues, "行凶动机未明，警方并不..." The audio cuts off before she can finish her sentence. There is no background music or other sound effects, placing the entire focus on the narrator's factual delivery.
